sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Fireball Attack
special_mechanics.description: Karnov shoots fireballs. Red orbs upgrade fireball count to maximum of three fireballs at once. NES version replaces Super Fireball with Spike Bomb that destroys all on-screen enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Shield Item
special_mechanics.description: NES exclusive item that reflects enemy fireballs. Replaces arcade Trolley item.

special_mechanics.name: Health System
special_mechanics.description: NES version: Karnov takes two hits to die instead of arcade's one hit. First hit turns character blue (one hit remaining). Blue fireball orb can restore a hit. Arcade version: single hit death.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain gameplay mechanics, level design changes between arcade/NES, and game progression information but lack specific movement physics values.
